'''Poqua''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and commander of [[Task Force Gemstone]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

{{Char-stub}}
